<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "Near-real-time forecast validation"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis

from helpers.live_validation_manifest import (
    render_live_validation_preview_panel,
    render_live_validation_summary,
    render_live_validation_table,
)

print(
    '<script>document.body.classList.add("live-evaluations-page");</script>'
    '<section class="live-evaluations-intro">'
    "<p>Near-real-time validation compares recent operational forecasts with recent Class IV observations "
    "for scientific validation and daily monitoring.</p>"
    "</section>"
)
print(render_live_validation_summary("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json"))
print(render_live_validation_table("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json"))
print(render_live_validation_preview_panel("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json"))
```
